title: Embed Everything - hosting custom HTML code on a dashboard
excerpt:
Howdy! 
I’m trying to host a custom HTML-based tool for my engineering team on a wiki dashboard, but Monday doesn’t support jsfiddle. Getting real tempted to just convert it to React native and hack the apps functionalit…

posts.author: MelissaH (Melissa Hallbauer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Howdy!

I’m trying to host a custom HTML-based tool for my engineering team on a wiki dashboard, but Monday doesn’t support jsfiddle. Getting real tempted to just convert it to React native and hack the apps functionality… Anyone had luck hosting custom code on a dashboard, and if so, how?

posts.author: MelissaH (Melissa Hallbauer)
posts.cookedHtml: OHOHOHO. Turns out I didn’t need to hack anything, just dump my HTML file on a “dashboard widget” feature in a custom app. Ye gods, that was stupidly easy. Keeping this here in case someone else has a similar question.

posts.author: MelissaH (Melissa Hallbauer)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
